summary: Major UI polish: clean Profile page, collapsible Focus Hub, Theme Picker, Font Style, Awards Sheet, and 17 new themes.

notes: Profile page restructured: Awards, Themes, and Font now open as dedicated bottom sheets instead of filling the page
Focus Hub sections are now collapsible — tap any section header (Insights, Overdue, Schedule) to expand or collapse it
17 themes available through a grouped Theme Picker sheet: Recommended, Dark, Light categories
Font Style setting added: choose from PlanIQ Standard, Modern, Soft, Readable, or Professional — applies instantly across the whole app
SparkAssistant mascot reacts to your achievement state in the Awards section
Awards detail moved to a dedicated sheet with grouped categories: Streaks, Visits, Completion, Focus
Daily Completion chart in Progress now always starts on Sunday and shows the correct calendar week
Calendar activity indicators redesigned: soft background tint + count badge instead of tiny invisible dots
Task Completion prompt (Time's Up modal) redesigned with cleaner hierarchy and better button spacing
Stats strip alignment fixed: all four columns use fixed-height rows so numbers, labels, and icons stay level
Yearly Calendar: fixed date cell sizing so dates never stack, overlap, or cluster
Activity days highlighted with a soft accent background; today highlighted with a filled accent circle
Software Update: now detects every Vercel deployment automatically using build SHA
Update badge appears on Profile icon when a new version is ready
User-controlled update flow: tap Update Now to apply, app never refreshes silently mid-session
In Progress sheet redesigned with theme-aware gradient ring and stat pills
Privacy and Terms added as a proper slide-in settings page
Software Update page shows build SHA for precise version tracking
System Settings navigation improved with consistent back/forward transitions
Fixed Add Schedule saving the wrong date in some timezones
Recurring schedules now appear correctly every week and in all future months
Per-occurrence completion fixed for repeating tasks
Focus Hub overdue items now have dedicated Reschedule, Complete, Missed, and Clear actions
Theme polish: charts, score rings, and progress bars follow the selected theme
